# AEOS Environment

Portability and environment generation.

## Modules

| Module | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| DevcontainerGenerator | VS Code devcontainer.json generation |
| DockerGenerator | Dockerfile generation |
| ComposeGenerator | Docker Compose generation |
| TaskfileGenerator | Taskfile.yml generation |
| CiGenerator | CI pipeline generation |
| DoctorScripts | Environment health check scripts |
